code: import axios from'axios';export const API_BASE=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||'http://localhost:5000/api';const getAuthHeaders=()=>{const token=localStorage.getItem('token');return token?{Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token)}:{};};export const eventService={getAll:()=>axios.get("".concat(API_BASE,"/events")),getById:id=>axios.get("".concat(API_BASE,"/events/").concat(id)),create:data=>axios.post("".concat(API_BASE,"/events"),data,{headers:getAuthHeaders()}),update:(id,data)=>axios.put("".concat(API_BASE,"/events/").concat(id),data,{headers:getAuthHeaders()}),delete:id=>axios.delete("".concat(API_BASE,"/events/").concat(id),{headers:getAuthHeaders()})};export const businessService={getAll:()=>axios.get("".concat(API_BASE,"/businesses")),getById:id=>axios.get("".concat(API_BASE,"/businesses/").concat(id)),create:data=>axios.post("".concat(API_BASE,"/businesses"),data,{headers:getAuthHeaders()}),addReview:(id,data)=>axios.post("".concat(API_BASE,"/businesses/").concat(id,"/review"),data,{headers:getAuthHeaders()})};export const jobService={getAll:()=>axios.get("".concat(API_BASE,"/jobs")),getById:id=>axios.get("".concat(API_BASE,"/jobs/").concat(id)),create:data=>axios.post("".concat(API_BASE,"/jobs"),data,{headers:getAuthHeaders()})};export const registrationService={create:data=>axios.post("".concat(API_BASE,"/registrations"),data,{headers:getAuthHeaders()}),getMyRegistrations:()=>axios.get("".concat(API_BASE,"/registrations/my-registrations"),{headers:getAuthHeaders()}),cancel:id=>axios.put("".concat(API_BASE,"/registrations/").concat(id,"/cancel"),{},{headers:getAuthHeaders()})};export const adminService={getDashboard:()=>axios.get("".concat(API_BASE,"/admin/dashboard"),{headers:getAuthHeaders()})};export const newsService={getAll:()=>axios.get("".concat(API_BASE,"/news")),getById:id=>axios.get("".concat(API_BASE,"/news/").concat(id))};
